authMethod: None by default (local loopback); intended to run on 127.0.0.1:11434. Optional reverse-proxy auth if exposed.

expectedFailureResponseShape.error: model 'qwen2.5-coder:14b' not found, try pulling it first

commonIntegrationFailure: Connection refused when the Ollama daemon is not running; 'model not found' when the model has not been pulled; LocalAIFactory must degrade gracefully (Ollama is optional).
preventionRule: Treat Ollama as optional: probe /api/tags via the cached health snapshot, never block a request path; pre-pull required models; never call synchronously in a controller (CLAUDE.md §5).
